creator: lkncastle@gmail.com
text:
I have update the port tree.

/ports/chinese/stardict2-dict-zh_CN  place dictionary files to wrong directory,
so that stardict can't load dictionary.

The right directory should be "/usr/X11R6/share/gnome/stardict/dic"

but place to                  "/usr/local/share/gnome/stardict/dic/"

How-To-Repeat: #cd /usr/ports/chinese/stardict2-dict-zh_CN/
#make install clean
#rehash
#stardict

then stardict report can't find any dictionarys.
